run_scope.next_rerun_policy: next rerun must record selected evidence, memory, gates, and bad-control boundaries before native PPT code

selection_rules: Choose exactly one primary commercial usecase before generating any arm.
Bind each selected slide role to at least one evidence record and one memory id.
Record why non-selected evidence was held back.
rejection_rules: Reject generation when the prompt names a usecase but no source-backed evidence record is selected.
Reject a rerun that advances to visual polish before data, memory, and gate ids are recorded.
gates.qa_probe: Trace manifest must show source-to-memory-to-slide binding for every slide role.
gates.bad_control_probe: bad control should fail when it receives the same broad usecase but cannot name selected evidence and memory ids.
gates.release_boundary: public_blocked until source selection is human-reviewed

selection_rules: Select this gate for cover and setup slides with broad launch claims.
Require one primary sentence, one generated motif, and one source-boundary note.
Hide trace details from the public surface unless required by QA.
rejection_rules: Reject equal feature grids on cover slides.
Reject copied brand signals or visible workflow debug labels as the main composition.
gates.qa_probe: Thumbnail must read one launch promise before any secondary label.
gates.bad_control_probe: bad control must fail when it recolors boxes or increases text size without a single identity field.
gates.release_boundary: public_blocked until cover thumbnail and brand-boundary review pass

selection_rules: Select this gate for proof slides where product reality must be visible.
Require editable native surface states, not raster surfaces.
Route method and trace labels to a secondary rail.
rejection_rules: Reject decorative depth effects when the product state is not inspectable.
gates.qa_probe: Object inventory must show native editable product-surface primitives and a readable proof object.
gates.bad_control_probe: bad control should fail if it uses copied UI, a generic dashboard, or decorative layers without proof.
gates.release_boundary: public_blocked until editable-object and source-boundary QA pass

selection_rules: Select this gate when a slide needs command, route, progress, and resolved state.
Require ordered reveal metadata even if the editable PPT is static.
Require reduced-motion fallback when a motion renderer is used later.
rejection_rules: Reject equal demo cards without a resolved state.
Reject motion claims without fallback and trace.
gates.qa_probe: Rendered slide or motion proof must show ordered state progression and a dominant resolved state.
gates.bad_control_probe: bad control should fail when it describes demo content but cannot produce a sequence route.
gates.release_boundary: public_blocked until motion proof, source mapping, and human review pass

selection_rules: Select this gate for the climax slide only.
Require exactly one primary outcome object.
Route caveats and secondary evidence to trace, notes, or a quiet rail.
rejection_rules: Reject climax slides that repeat setup/proof grid structure.
gates.qa_probe: Climax first read must be one outcome object and no unverified numeric claim.
gates.bad_control_probe: bad control should fail when it makes the climax a dense metrics table or invents source numbers.
gates.release_boundary: public_blocked until metric verification and human approval pass

selection_rules: Run this gate for every slide after role-specific selection.
Require macro zone, margin, gutter, and visible-word budget before drawing.
Require anti-copy boundary text for every evidence-derived slide.
rejection_rules: Reject slides that exceed visible-word budget without routing detail.
Reject copied tutorial/example phrasing, raw transcripts, frames, or source layouts.
Reject color-only aesthetic changes without spacing tokens.
gates.qa_probe: Layout JSON and thumbnail review must show protected whitespace and no raw source material.
gates.bad_control_probe: bad control should fail if it can cite tutorials but cannot satisfy spacing tokens, word budgets, and anti-copy checks.
gates.release_boundary: public_blocked until layout geometry QA and anti-copy review pass
